A [[Loronar/Legends|Loronar]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] serving in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], the '''''Scythe''''' had been assigned as a convoy escort ship during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The [[Veltnor|convoy]] it was assigned to protect en route to the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]] was [[Destruction of the Scythe convoy|destroyed]] by then-rookie pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]. It is unclear if the ''Scythe'' itself survived the battle or not.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
